heading: Special assistance for the educationally disadvantaged
label: 3533 Special assistance for the educationally disadvantaged
notes: Amendments1991—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(a)section 1733 of this titleSubsec. (a)(1). , substituted “3491(a)” for “1691(a)” and “3491(b)” for “1691(b)”.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(c)(1)substituted “Secretary” for “Secretary of Veterans Affairs”.Pub. L. 102–16Subsec. (b). , substituted “3511” for “1711” and “3492” for “1692”.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(c)(1)1989—Subsec. (a)(1). substituted “assistance provided an eligible veteran under section 1691(a) (if pursued in a State) of this title and be paid an educational assistance allowance therefor in the manner prescribed by , except that the corresponding rate provisions of this chapter shall apply, as determined by the Secretary of Veterans Affairs, to such pursuit by an eligible person.” for “benefits provided an eligible veteran (with no dependents) under section 1691 (if pursued in a State) of this title.”Pub. (a) read as follows: “Any eligible spouse or surviving spouse shall, without charge to any entitlement such spouse may have under , be entitled to the benefits provided an eligible veteran (with no dependents) under section 1691 (if pursued in a State) of this title.”Pub. L. 100–689section 1711 of this title1984—Subsec. (a). inserted “(with no dependents)” after “an eligible veteran” and struck out “and be paid an educational assistance allowance under the provisions of ”.Pub. children.text: Any eligible person shall be entitled to the assistance provided an eligible veteran under section 3491(a) (if pursued in a State) of this title and be paid an educational assistance allowance therefor in the manner prescribed by , except that the corresponding rate provisions of this chapter shall apply, as determined by the Secretary, to such pursuit by an eligible person.section 3491(b) of this title

Educational assistance under this chapter for the first five months of full-time pursuit of a program (or the equivalent thereof in part-time educational assistance) consisting of such course or courses shall be provided without charge to entitlement.

children.label: b
